message: New enterprise order from Northstar Labs for $4,280.
AtlasOps submitted a pending renewal worth $6,120.
SignalStack upgraded their workspace to Enterprise.
BrightByte started a Free trial from the inbound demo queue.
Nova Portal received a $1,140 refund for duplicate seats.
HeliumDesk reactivated after a customer success review.
Clearpath HQ completed a $3,960 implementation package.
Keystone CRM joined as a new lead from partner referral.
OrbitDesk renewed nine Enterprise seats for $8,260.
MapleWorks entered the pipeline after a product webinar.
